definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Whose keys are these?]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante interrogativo para preguntar sobre posesión.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as an interrogative determiner to ask about possession.

definitions.usage_example: The man whose car was stolen.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The man whose car was stolen.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado como determinante relativo para mostrar posesión.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used as a relative determiner to show possession.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Aquellos que / Los que]
definitions.usage_example: Help is available for those who need it.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE those who AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Help is available for those who need it.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una forma formal de referirse a 'la gente que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A formal way to refer to 'the people who'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: El que / La que]
definitions.usage_example: She is the one who called.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE the one who AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: She is the one who called.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para especificar una sola persona de un grupo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to specify a single person from a group.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Los que / Las que]
definitions.usage_example: They are the ones who helped.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE the ones who AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: They are the ones who helped.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para especificar múltiples personas de un grupo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to specify multiple people from a group.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Quienquiera que / Quien sea]
definitions.usage_example: Whoever finishes first wins a prize.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Whoever finishes first wins a prize.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para significar 'cualquier persona que'.]

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Lo que sea / Cualquier cosa que]
definitions.usage_example: You can do whatever you want.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: You can do whatever you want.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para significar 'cualquier cosa o todo lo que'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mean 'anything or everything that'.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Lo que sea (informal, indiferencia)]
definitions.usage_example: Do you want pizza or pasta? Whatever.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Do you want pizza or pasta? Whatever.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado informalmente para mostrar indiferencia.]

definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Choose whichever one you like.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Usado para significar 'cualquiera de un conjunto limitado'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Used to mean 'any one from a limited set'.
